audit_items.proof_trace: All peer-provided data (cells, proofs, indices) is fully validated before use. The gossip handler validates: (1) index bounds and subnet consistency (L480-481, L535-537, L741-748), (2) cells/proofs array length consistency (L542-558), (3) KZG inclusion proof (L502, L588), (4) cryptographic KZG cell proofs via batch verification (L507-508 → kzg_utils.rs:95 → crypto/kzg verify_cell_proof_batch). No code path uses peer data before these checks complete.
